name: Telvantis, Inc.
summary: PART I Business Development and Summary We were originally incorporated in the State of Nevada on March 29, 2006, under the name White Dental Supply, Inc. We were authorized to issue 100,000,000 shares of its $0.001 par value common stock and 100,000,000 shares of its $0.001 par value preferred stock.
